# Test Fixtures

## sample.pdf

A 6-page synthetic PDF generated by `make_sample.py`. Not derived from any
external source — each page asserts one fact so that tests can verify
citations resolve to the correct page.

| Page | Topic           | Key fact for citation tests                                |
|------|-----------------|------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1    | Title / intro   | (no testable claim)                                        |
| 2    | The Sun         | core temperature ~15 million kelvin                        |
| 3    | Jupiter         | mass ~318 Earth masses                                     |
| 4    | Saturn          | rings are mostly water ice                                 |
| 5    | Exoplanets      | TRAPPIST-1e announced February 2017                        |
| 6    | References      | (no testable claim)                                        |

To regenerate: `uv run python tests/fixtures/make_sample.py`.

## sample.docx

A synthetic Word document generated by `make_sample_docx.py`. Mirrors the facts
in `sample.pdf` but organized under headings so DOCX section-citation tests can
assert the locator resolves to the right heading.

| Section      | Key fact                                   |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------|
| (Mở đầu)     | (preamble, no testable claim)              |
| The Sun      | core temperature ~15 million kelvin        |
| Jupiter      | mass ~318 Earth masses                     |
| Exoplanets   | TRAPPIST-1e announced February 2017        |

To regenerate: `uv run python tests/fixtures/make_sample_docx.py`.

## sample.fits

A 2-HDU FITS file generated by `make_sample_fits.py`. Exercises FITS ingestion:
its header metadata is the searchable text, cited by HDU.

| HDU | Name      | Key content                                                   |
|-----|-----------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| 0   | PRIMARY   | OBJECT=M31, TELESCOP=Hubble, INSTRUME=WFC3, EXPTIME=1200, 10x10 image |
| 1   | SPECTRUM  | BinTable, columns WAVELENGTH/FLUX, 3 rows                     |

To regenerate: `uv run python tests/fixtures/make_sample_fits.py`.
